Title: Navigating from DashboardActivity to MainActivity
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open DashboardActivity.
2. Tap on the navigation icon to open MainActivity.
Expected Result: MainActivity should be displayed with appropriate UI elements.

Title: Navigating from MainActivity to SignUpActivity
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Sign Up" button.
Expected Result: SignUpActivity should be displayed with appropriate UI elements.

Title: Navigating from MainActivity to UserListActivity
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "User List" button.
Expected Result: UserListActivity should be displayed with appropriate UI elements.

Title: Successful Sign-Up Process
Preconditions: User is not logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open SignUpActivity.
2. Enter a valid email and password.
3. Tap on the "Sign Up" button.
Expected Result: User should be successfully signed up and redirected to MainActivity.

Title: Invalid Sign-Up Process - Empty Email
Preconditions: User is not logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open SignUpActivity.
2. Leave the email field empty and enter a valid password.
3. Tap on the "Sign Up" button.
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed indicating that the email field cannot be empty.

Title: Invalid Sign-Up Process - Empty Password
Preconditions: User is not logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open SignUpActivity.
2. Enter a valid email and leave the password field empty.
3. Tap on the "Sign Up" button.
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed indicating that the password field cannot be empty.

Title: Loading Users from Server
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open UserListActivity.
2. Wait for the list of users to load.
Expected Result: A list of users should be displayed in the RecyclerView.

Title: Display Current Weather
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Weather" button.
3. Wait for the current weather to be displayed.
Expected Result: Current weather information should be displayed.

Title: Zoom In on Current Weather
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Weather" button.
3. Tap on the magnifying glass icon.
4. Tap on "Search for other locations weather".
Expected Result: The user should be prompted to search for weather in another location.

Title: Selecting a Trekking Route
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
3. Wait for the list of provinces to load.
4. Tap on a province.
5. Wait for the list of routes to load.
6. Tap on a route.
Expected Result: The selected route details should be displayed.

Title: Fetching Past Training Data
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Health" button.
3. Wait for the list of past training data to load.
Expected Result: A list of past training data should be displayed.

Title: Invalid Health Data Request
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Health" button.
3. Wait for the list of past training data to load.
4. Simulate network failure during data fetching.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that there was an issue fetching the data.

Title: Handling Network Failure During Weather Data Request
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Weather" button.
3. Simulate network failure.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that there was an issue fetching the weather data.

Title: Handling Network Failure During Province List Request
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
3. Simulate network failure.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that there was an issue fetching the province list.

Title: Handling Network Failure During Route List Request
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
3. Wait for the list of provinces to load.
4. Tap on a province.
5. Simulate network failure.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that there was an issue fetching the route list.

Title: Handling Network Failure During Past Training Data Request
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Health" button.
3. Simulate network failure.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that there was an issue fetching the past training data.

Title: Invalid Login Credentials
Preconditions: User is not logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Enter an invalid email and password.
3. Tap on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the login credentials are invalid.

Title: Invalid Login Credentials - Empty Fields
Preconditions: User is not logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Leave both the email and password fields empty.
3. Tap on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the email and password fields cannot be empty.

Title: Logging Out from MainActivity
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the logout button.
Expected Result: The user should be logged out and redirected to the DashboardActivity.

Title: Attempting to Access MainActivity Without Logging In
Preconditions: User is not logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on any button that requires authentication.
Expected Result: The user should be prompted to log in before accessing the required feature.

Title: Empty RecyclerView in UserListActivity
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open UserListActivity.
2. Wait for the list to load.
Expected Result: The RecyclerView should be empty if no users are available.

Title: Empty RecyclerView in Health Flow
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Health" button.
3. Wait for the list to load.
Expected Result: The RecyclerView should be empty if no past training data is available.

Title: Invalid Province Selection
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
3. Enter an invalid province name.
4. Tap on the "Search" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the province name is invalid.

Title: Invalid Route Selection
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
3. Wait for the list of provinces to load.
4. Tap on a province.
5. Enter an invalid route name.
6. Tap on the "Search" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the route name is invalid.

2. Tap on the "Health" button.
3. Enter invalid health data.
4. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the health data entry is invalid.

2. Tap on the "Health" button.

Test Steps:
1. Open MainActivity.
2. Tap on the "Weather" button.
3. Leave all weather data fields empty.
4. Tap on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the weather data fields cannot be empty.

2. Tap on the "Trekking" button.
